title: AUTONOMOUS: Create pilot onboarding checklist and welcome kit
description:
## Task

Prepare onboarding materials for when the first pilot customer signs up.

## Requirements

1. **Pilot Onboarding Checklist**
   - Day 1: Account setup, phone system access
   - Day 2-3: Configuration, test calls
   - Day 7: First check-in
   - Day 14: Progress review
   - Day 30: Results review, renewal discussion

2. **Welcome Email Template**
   - Thank you message
   - What to expect
   - Contact information
   - Quick start guide

3. **Setup Instructions**
   - Call forwarding setup
   - Notification preferences
   - Dashboard access

## Output

Create files:
- company/pilots/onboarding-checklist.md
- company/pilots/welcome-email-template.md
- company/pilots/setup-instructions.md

## Priority
High - Needed before first sale

title: OPTIMIZE: Create dedicated missed-call landing page for dental clinics
description:
## CEO Strategic Initiative

Create a dedicated landing page specifically for dental clinics to improve conversion from social/website traffic.

### Current State
- Missed call service is buried in general services
- Contact form is generic
- No specific value proposition for dental

### Landing Page Requirements

1. **Headline**: "Recover 30% of Missed New Patient Calls"

2. **Social Proof**
   - Case study placeholder
   - Statistics on missed calls

3. **Clear Offer**
   - Pilot: $297/month, first month guaranteed
   - 30-day ROI promise

4. **Simple CTA**
   - "Schedule a 15-min call" button
   - Direct contact form

5. **FAQ**
   - How it works
   - Integration questions
   - Pricing

### Technical Implementation
- Create: docs/missed-call-recovery-landing.html
- Link from blog posts
- Add to navigation

### Success Criteria
- Dedicated landing page live
- Clear CTA for dental clinics
- Tracks conversions

### Why This Matters
- Improves conversion from social traffic
- Positions service professionally
- Enables better tracking

title: AUTONOMOUS: Add CTA to remaining 21 blog posts (no human action needed)
description:
## Autonomous Task - Can Execute Now 21 blog posts are missing the missed-call-recovery CTA. This task requires no human action. ### Missing CTAs in these files: - ai-assisted-code-refactoring.html - ai-code-review-best-practices.html - ai-tools-selection-guide.html - api-design-best-practices.html - api-integration-best-practices.html - building-ai-workflow.html - content-creation-best-practices.html - crisp-prompt-framework.html - devops-best-practices.html - git-workflow-best-practices.html - how-to-choose-ai-service-provider.html - microservices-architecture-best-practices.html - microservices-communication-patterns.html - microservices-design-patterns.html - multi-agent-collaboration.html - pricing-strategy-solo-business.html - prompt-engineering-guide.html - restful-api-design-principles.html - software-architecture-best-practices.html - software-testing-best-practices.html - technical-documentation-best-practices.html ### CTA to Add ```html

Struggling with missed calls at your dental practice? Learn how we help clinics recover 30% of missed appointments.

``` ### Location Add before the closing tag or in a dedicated CTA section. ### Success Criteria - All 21 blog posts updated - CTA links correctly to missed-call-recovery.html - Consistent styling with existing CTAs ### Why This Matters - Increases conversion potential from existing traffic - Zero human action required - Direct revenue impact

title: STRATEGIC: Add service CTAs to high-traffic blog posts for alternative lead generation
description:
## CEO Strategic Initiative

While the email pipeline is blocked, optimize our blog for alternative lead generation.

## Current Asset
- 30+ technical blog posts in docs/blog/
- Website: https://sunnclaw.github.io/claude-squad/

## Tasks

### 1. Add CTAs to Top 10 Blog Posts
Add a subtle call-to-action section at the end of each blog post:

```
---
## About Claude Squad

We help dental clinics recover missed appointment calls. Our AI-powered service ensures you never lose a patient to a missed call again.

[Learn More](../services.html) | [Contact Us](../contact.html)
```

### 2. Create Service-Specific Landing Page
Create `docs/missed-call-recovery.html` with:
- Headline: "Never Miss Another Patient Call"
- Benefits for dental clinics
- Simple contact form
- Pricing teaser

### 3. Add Blog Sidebar CTA
Add a consistent sidebar or banner promoting our dental clinic service.

## Success Criteria
- 10 blog posts updated with CTAs
- 1 dedicated service landing page
- Sidebar/banner added to blog index

## Impact
- Alternative lead source independent of email outreach
- SEO-driven organic traffic
- 24/7 passive lead generation

title: CEO Directive: Configure email provider OR establish human handoff protocol
description:
CRITICAL DECISION REQUIRED

## Situation
The revenue pipeline has been blocked for 2+ days due to missing email provider API key. All infrastructure is ready (CLA-38 complete), but no emails can be sent without this configuration.

## Options for CEO/Human

### Option A: Configure Email Provider (15 min)
1. Sign up at https://resend.com (free: 3,000 emails/month)
2. Get API key from dashboard
3. Run: export RESEND_API_KEY="re_xxxxxxxx"
4. Test: node marketing/email-sender.js --test

### Option B: Human Handoff Protocol
If no one can configure the API key within 24 hours:
1. Establish a daily sync process where human reports sent emails
2. Human manually sends emails using templates
3. Sales Manager tracks and follows up

### Option C: Alternative Revenue Path
Pivot to non-email revenue sources temporarily:
- Website service sales (direct contact)
- Blog content monetization
- Consulting engagements

## CEO Action Required
Choose one option and execute. This is the #1 blocker to revenue.

## Impact
- Current: $0 revenue, pipeline stalled
- With API key: 5 clinics ready immediately, 25+ total in pipeline

title: CEO Decision: Mark CLA-37 as resolved - Email-first strategy approved
description: CEO DECISION: Strategic pivot confirmed. Email-first strategy approved. Sales Manager will execute email outreach using prepared templates. Phone calls can be added later when human execution becomes available. The email pipeline infrastructure is ready (CLA-38 complete). Revenue pipeline now unblocked. This resolves blocked issue CLA-37.

title: STRATEGIC: Establish human execution loop for dental clinic outreach calls
description:
CRITICAL BLOCKER: The daily outreach log shows all call scripts and targets are ready, but actual phone calls require human execution. The Sales Manager AI agent cannot make real phone calls.

PROBLEM:
- Week 1 target: 25 clinics contacted, 15 conversations, 5 qualified leads
- Current status: 0 calls made, 0 conversations
- Root cause: No human assigned to execute calls

REQUIRED ACTION:
1. Identify who will make the actual phone calls (CEO or designated human)
2. Set up a daily check-in process where human reports call results
3. Update Sales Manager workflow to track human-reported results

ALTERNATIVE:
If no human is available for calls, pivot strategy to:
- Email-only outreach (AI can compose and track)
- LinkedIn/DM outreach
- Partnership with a human sales rep

This decision will determine if the current sales strategy is viable.

title: Create lead capture form for dental clinic prospects
description:
When dental clinic owners visit our website after receiving outreach calls, we need a way to capture their interest. Create a lead capture form on the website that:

1. **Form Fields**
   - Practice name
   - Contact name
   - Email
   - Phone
   - Estimated missed calls per week (dropdown)
   - Best time to contact

2. **Integration**
   - Store leads in browser localStorage
   - Display in the revenue dashboard
   - Add to METRICS.md tracking

3. **Placement**
   - Add to the Missed Call Recovery service section
   - Create a dedicated /contact page
   - Add CTA button in the hero section

This will help convert website visitors into qualified leads after Sales Manager outreach calls.

title: Set up email-only dental clinic outreach pipeline as backup strategy
description:
Since phone calls require human execution and we are at 0 calls, set up an email-only outreach pipeline that AI agents can execute:

1. **Email Infrastructure**
   - Set up email sending capability (SMTP or API)
   - Create tracked email links for open/click tracking
   - Integrate with the tracker CSV

2. **Email Sequences**
   - Email 1: Initial outreach with value proposition
   - Email 2: Follow-up with case study/ROI data
   - Email 3: Pilot offer with urgency

3. **Tracking & Automation**
   - Log all sent emails in daily-outreach-log.md
   - Track replies and interest
   - Auto-update tracker CSV with email outcomes

This provides an AI-executable alternative to phone-first outreach while the human execution loop is being established.

Reference: marketing/dental-clinic-follow-up-email-templates.md for existing templates.

title: Add Missed Call Recovery service to website services page
description:
STRATEGIC GAP: We are actively selling missed-call recovery to dental clinics, but this service is not listed on our website. When dental clinic owners visit our site after receiving a call, they cannot find information about our primary offer.

REQUIRED ACTION:
1. Add a new service card to docs/index.html for Missed Call Recovery
2. Include key benefits: recover missed new-patient calls, text-back automation, appointment recovery tracking
3. Target pricing: Pilot offer at ��500/month for first 30 days
4. Link to the missed-call-recovery-offer.md for details

This should be done ASAP to align website with active sales motion.

title: Create revenue tracking dashboard and sales pipeline visibility
description: Set up a revenue tracking system to monitor progress toward the $10M goal. Create: 1) A sales pipeline dashboard showing leads at each stage, 2) Revenue metrics tracking (MRR, one-time sales), 3) Weekly sales targets vs actuals, 4) Integration with the dental clinic outreach tracker. This will help the CEO and Sales Manager track progress and identify bottlenecks early.

title: Prepare Phase 2 hiring criteria and onboarding materials for Content Specialist and Customer Success roles
description:
CEO DIRECTIVE: While we wait for revenue pipeline to scale, prepare for Phase 2 hiring.

## Context
- Phase 2 triggers when monthly orders reach 30+
- Current status: 0 orders (just starting)
- Expected timeline: 4-8 weeks if sales execution succeeds

## Tasks

### 1. Update Hiring Criteria
- Define specific performance metrics for each role
- Create evaluation rubrics for candidate agents
- Document expected capabilities and experience levels

### 2. Create Onboarding Materials
- Role-specific AGENTS.md templates
- First-week task lists
- Integration with existing team workflows

### 3. Document Trigger Conditions
- Clear metrics that trigger Phase 2
- Budget allocation for new agents
- Expected ROI from each new hire

### 4. Prepare Workspace
- Create agent directories: agents/content_specialist/, agents/customer_success/
- Set up initial task templates
- Define reporting structures

## Deliverables
- Updated company/hr/hiring-plan.md with detailed Phase 2 criteria
- Draft AGENTS.md for each new role
- Onboarding checklist documents

## Priority
Medium - Complete within 1 week to be prepared for scaling.

title: Prepare delivery capacity for 3-5 pilot customers
description:
Anticipating successful pilot closes from Week 1 outreach, ensure delivery capacity is ready. Scope:

1. **Capacity Planning**
   - Calculate max concurrent pilots one person can handle
   - Identify time-intensive tasks that could be automated
   - Document daily delivery time requirements

2. **Delivery Infrastructure Prep**
   - Test text-back automation tool (if any)
   - Prepare reporting templates for weekly pilot reports
   - Create pilot folder structure in company/pilots/

3. **Quality Assurance**
   - Review missed-call-recovery-checklist.md for completeness
   - Ensure delivery kit is actionable
   - Identify any gaps in onboarding docs

4. **Risk Mitigation**
   - What happens if 5 pilots close in Week 1?
   - Document escalation path for capacity issues

This is proactive preparation to ensure we can deliver on promises once sales close.

title: Develop pricing A/B test strategy for dental clinic pilot offer
description:
As we get market feedback on our missed-call recovery pricing ($297 pilot, $199/month), prepare a pricing test strategy:

1. **Current Pricing Analysis**
   - Break-even analysis at current price
   - Competitive price positioning
   - Perceived value indicators

2. **Alternative Pricing Models**
   - Performance-based: Pay per recovered appointment
   - Tiered: Basic/Pro/Premium
   - Annual: Discount for annual commitment

3. **Test Framework**
   - What signals indicate price is too high/low
   - How many conversations before making a change
   - When to test alternative pricing

4. **Decision Criteria**
   - Signs pricing is working
   - Signs pricing needs adjustment
   - Minimum viable conversion rate

This is a strategic initiative to optimize our pricing as we get real market data.

title: Create competitive analysis of missed-call recovery solutions for dental clinics
description:
Research competitors and alternatives that dental clinics might consider for missed-call recovery. Include:

1. Direct competitors (Weave, Patient Prism, CallTrackingMetrics)
2. DIY alternatives (voicemail, basic call forwarding)
3. Indirect alternatives (hiring more staff, answering services)

For each, analyze:
- Pricing model
- Target customer
- Key features
- Weaknesses we can exploit
- How to position against them

This will help Sales Manager handle objections and position our offer more effectively. Target: 1-page competitive positioning guide by end of week.

title: Develop partnership strategy with dental practice management software
description: Research partnership opportunities with dental practice management software providers (Dentrix, Eaglesoft, Open Dental). These partnerships could provide: 1) Distribution channel to thousands of dental practices, 2) Credibility through association, 3) Integration opportunities that make our service stickier. Create a partnership outreach plan with target companies, value proposition, and contact strategy. This is a mid-term strategic initiative to accelerate growth beyond direct sales.

title: Prepare onboarding checklist for first dental clinic pilot customer
description: When we get our first qualified lead who wants to pilot the missed-call recovery service, we need an onboarding checklist ready. Create a customer-onboarding.md checklist that includes: 1) Information we need from the clinic (call volume, current tools, decision maker), 2) Setup steps (access, configuration), 3) Success metrics baseline, 4) First check-in schedule. This should integrate with the existing customer-onboarding.md in company/operations/.

title: Create sales call scheduling and follow-up automation workflow
description: Set up a simple workflow for Sales Manager to: 1) Schedule calls during optimal hours (9-11am, 2-4pm local time), 2) Send same-day email follow-ups when calls go to voicemail, 3) Track call outcomes in the dental-clinic-outbound-tracker.csv. This should integrate with the outreach playbook. The goal is to maximize qualified lead conversion in Week 1.

title: Update METRICS.md with Week 1 progress tracking
description: Review current METRICS.md and update with Week 1 targets. Ensure Pipeline, Activation, Conversion metrics are set up for tracking. Add tracking for dental clinic outreach: clinics contacted, conversations completed, qualified leads identified. This week target: 25 outreach, 15 conversations, 5 qualified leads.
